column1: # WYSIWYG text styles survive /File Save → /File Retrieve.
# Bold + italic on A1, underline on A2.  Write to xlsx, reopen, and
# verify both cells still carry their styles and that the `{…}` marker
# is back on line 1 for the re-pointered cell.
# /FR the same file — styles should return intact.
# Pointer is at A1 after retrieve — line 1 should show the marker again.
